rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Lato for headings.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase, text-xs, with tracking-[0.2em].
Use font-light for large numbers in KPI tiles to make them elegant, not bulky.
No pure black or pure gray. Tint neutrals slightly towards green/emerald.
Ensure text meets APCA minimum 4.5:1 contrast.
Limit the use of primary color to CTAs and active states.
CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.

visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-lg for inner elements like badges.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards.

KPI_Tiles.description: Elegant tiles with large numbers, icons, mini sparkline charts, and progress indicators.
KPI_Tiles.layout: Flex column, top section with Title & Icon, middle with massive font-light Number & Badge, bottom with Recharts sparkline.
KPI_Tiles.chart: Recharts LineChart with height 60px, no axes, no grid, stroke emerald-600, strokeWidth 2.

Address_Cards.layout: Include a subtle leading icon (MapPin), uppercase overline for address type (e.g., BILLING), and standard body text for address.
Address_Cards.style: Flat background, 1px emerald-100 border, hover lift effect.

Data_Table.style: border-collapse, alternating rows using even:bg-emerald-50/40, hover:bg-emerald-50/60. Headers should have uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-semibold text-emerald-800/70.
Data_Table.interaction: TableRow must have cursor-pointer and onClick handler navigating to details.

Tabs.style: Minimalist underline style. Active tab gets a 2px bottom border of emerald-800 and text-emerald-900. Inactive tabs text-emerald-600/60.

rules: Do not use generic 'transition-all' on elements that transform.
Add micro-interactions to table row clicks (e.g., active:scale-[0.99]).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='distributor-row-1').
Sparklines must have aria-label for screen readers.
Status badges must use appropriate accessible colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Manrope' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body font.
Install '@phosphor-icons/react' for elegant, professional icons suitable for dense dashboards.
Install 'recharts' for the mini sparkline charts inside KPI tiles.
For the Distribution module, create a layout that features 4 KPI tiles at the top, followed by a filter/search bar, and then the main Distributors Table.

For the Distributor Detail page (/distributors/:id), implement a header with the Distributor Name and Status, followed by the Address Cards grid, and then the 6 Tabs (Profile, Commercial, Stock In, Stock Out, Settlements, Billing).
Implement table pagination defaulting to 50 rows per page. Add a dropdown to change row count.
Ensure table rows are fully clickable and navigate to the distributor detail page.
Alternate table rows MUST use 'even:bg-emerald-50/40' to give a very light brand color tint.
KPI Tile Numbers MUST use a light font weight (e.g., font-light text-4xl or text-5xl) to appear elegant rather than clunky.
Do NOT center align the app container. Keep text aligned naturally.
Ensure all code is written in .js/.jsx, as the project does not use TypeScript.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
